string.text: Eliminate Target for Sultan
Find and eliminate the target then return to Sultan for payment.

%c[ui_8]There are many people in the Zone who have rubbed me the wrong way or shown me disrespect. Some of these pricks either owe me money or fucked up some deal. These people are nothing but rats that need stomped out. If you are up for the task, I will give you their information so that you can track them through GPS.
Great work! Here's a little something for your trouble.
Eliminate Bandit for Sultan
Sultan has contracted you to run a hit. Find and eliminate the target then return to him for payment.

%c[ui_8]I got a job, and you're the perfect guy for it. There's a low-level punk making too much noise. Thinks he can make a name running his mouth behind my back, trying to knock me down. That kind of disrespect? That's not how things work among men who live by a code. You take care of this mutt - and you won't walk away empty-handed. Just make sure he goes down quiet. No mess.\n\n%c[ui_orange][This task involves killing a friendly or neutral stalker, which will result in a loss of reputation. Witnesses may disapprove and could attack the player]
Good, you got rid of that asshole! Here is what I promised.
Eliminate Stalker for Sultan
Sultan has contracted you to run a hit. Find and eliminate the target then return to him for payment.
%c[ui_8]I have a list of people who have rubbed me the wrong way. I want you to rub them out. What do you say?
Good, you got rid of that asshole! Here is what I promised.
Eliminate Enemy Threat for Olivius
You have been tasked to eliminate a territorial threat within the area. Report back to Olivius after the job is done.

%c[ui_8]Bitches are moving into our territory. The boss gave me orders to recruit a low life with enough balls to reclaim some of these camps. What do you say? Do you have enough hair on your chest?\n\n%c[ui_orange][This task will fail if after taking it, the player goes to a location where this task is not available]
Fantastic! Here is your payment. I'll make sure to put a good word in for you with the boss.
Assault Enemy Camp for Olivius
You have been tasked to assault the area. Report back to Olivius after the job is done.

%c[ui_8]Listen, pal, got a job for you. The local stalkers have gone completely out of line. They're refusing to share their cut from the artifacts they find. I don't think I need to explain what needs to be done with them. We must give 'em a lesson they learn the hard way. Take these punks down, and you won't walk away empty-handed.\n\n%c[ui_orange][This task will fail if after taking it, the player goes to a location where this task is not available]
Good job! Here is your money.
Chiki-Briki i v Damke
Get the upper hand on local stalkers by relieving them of their valuables long enough until your band of merry men are satisfied.
%c[ui_8]There are a few guys who are looking for another to join up with them for a while. They need a scout to take them out looking for prime targets and will pay you once your job is done.
Nice take, eh? Here is your cut.
Eliminate Mutant Threat for Olivius
Mutants have been spotted near this location making the area dangerous. You have been tasked to eliminate the mutant threat within the area. Report back to Olivius after the job is done.

%c[ui_8]We've been looking for someone with enough balls to clear out mutants in a few places. Stalkers aren't coming around here because they are too afraid. If we don't do something about it we won't have anyone left to "borrow" any goods from, then we will have to move out of this territory.\n\n%c[ui_orange][This task will fail if after taking it, the player goes to a location where this task is not available]
Fantastic! Here is your payment. I'll make sure to put a good word in for you with the boss.
Find %s for Limpid
%s are required by Limpid to install basic equipment upgrades, you should bring them back to him if you find any.
I'm in desperate need of new tools, man. I can't do anything with the rusty shit I have and I'm running out of gun oil. If you are interested in helping me out, I will tell you what I need.
%c[ui_8]I need a set of %c[ui_orange]%s%c[ui_8]. It should contain what I need. If you can bring some back for me I will be grateful, I will even offer you a discount from here on out.
Perfect! This is just what I need, man. I can properly upgrade gear now!
Find %s for Limpid
%s are required by Limpid to install advanced equipment upgrades, you should bring them back to him if you find any.
The toolkit you brought me is great, but it doesn't have everything I need. Do you think you can find me a better set?
%c[ui_8]I need an %c[ui_orange]%s%c[ui_8]. I'm not sure where you can get one of these, but if you can find one, I need it.
You followed through again! Good deal, man, here is some money.
Find %s for Limpid
%s are required by Limpid to install expert equipment upgrades, you should bring them back to him if you find any.
The toolkit you brought me is great, but it doesn't have everything I need. Do you think you can find me a better set?
%c[ui_8]I need an %c[ui_orange]%s%c[ui_8]. I'm not sure where you can get one of these, but if you can find one, I need it.
You followed through again! Good deal, man, here is some money.
Find %s for Limpid
Limpid asked for %s. It needs to be in good condition.
I need a certain gun. If you are interested in the job, I will give you more details. What would you say?

%c[ui_8]I'm setting up the guys with some gear. For that, I need a few guns, gotta strip some parts. Right now, I need %c[ui_orange]%s%c[ui_8], and it better be in good shape. If you find one, bring it here. And if it's busted, use a %c[ui_orange]Gunsmith kit%c[ui_8] to fix it up. Or I can help, but it won't be for free.
Great! Exactly what I need.
Bring Alcohol for Scalpel
%s get it and bring it to Scalpel, so he can use it for wound disinfection.
Boys knocked back all my rubbing alcohol. If someone gets sliced up, we won't have jack to treat the wound. If you run into any spirits, bring it here.

%c[ui_8]Listen, bro, the boys ran a birthday for a solid man - proper blowout. Problem is they knocked back all my rubbing alcohol. If someone gets sliced up, we won't have jack to treat the wound. If you run into any spirits, bring it here - I won't short you on cash. %c[ui_orange]%s%c[default] would be perfect.
Good job! Here - like I promised
Lead the way and we will follow. You will get your cut when we are done. Just make sure we are the ones doing the looting and watch our backs.
We should get moving - my trigger finger is getting itchy. Just remember, we get the loot!
You did your job well. Here is your cut.
Okay.
